raw_response:
Variant A is the more useful report for me as the operator of Zeit für Brot. Its analysis is grounded in a clear, verifiable premise: my specific location is absent from delivery apps, and this is the core problem. The report provides concrete, actionable intelligence, such as The Sanctuary's aggressive 50% bundle discount on Lieferando, which directly addresses my question about competitor tactics. The data points are specific, plausible, and lack the glaring credibility issues of Variant B. While B offers more sophisticated insights into customer psychology and algorithmic behavior, its entire analysis is compromised by a future date (2026) and a sloppy conflation of data from my other branches. As a GM, I cannot trust or act on a report with such a fundamental data integrity flaw. Variant A gives me a trustworthy diagnosis and a clear strategic choice: either get this location onto delivery platforms to compete, or consciously cede that market.

```json
{"winner": "A", "supporting_urls": ["https://www.lieferando.de/speisekarte/the-sanctuary-1", "https://www.wolt.com/de/deu/berlin/restaurant/frea-bakery"]}
```
